name: Zilong

skills.name: Dragon's Roar
skills.description: The lower his Health, the greater his damage reduction and skills.

skills.name: Thunderbreaker
skills.description: Zilong charges forward, dealing damage and enhancing his next Basic Attack. This skill's cooldown is reset whenever his Health reaches a certain level.

skills.name: Stormpiercer
skills.description: Jabs repeatedly in the target direction, dealing damage. Recovers Health on hit.

skills.name: Skysplitter
skills.description: Leaps to the target area, damaging and launching enemies in the center.

tips: Zilong is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.7% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Resistance → Axe of Torment → Master Sword → Pure Sky → Eternity Blade.
Run Mutation for stats that match Zilong's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Thunderbreaker → Stormpiercer → Skysplitter → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Zilong excels into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Avoid blind picking into Guiguzi, Ziya, Fang without team peel.

Zilong sits at Tier B globally (52.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Zilong good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Zilong is Tier B Assassin with 52.7% win rate, 0.6% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Zilong build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Master Sword, Pure Sky, Eternity Blade. Run Mutation arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Zilong?
faqs.answer: Pick Guiguzi, Ziya, Fang into Zilong. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Zilong completes core items. Zilong struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Zilong counter?
faqs.answer: Zilong is strong into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Zilong when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Zilong good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Zilong sits at Tier B globally (52.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Zilong play?
faqs.answer: Zilong is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Fighter, Assassin). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Zilong?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mutation arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Zilong or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Zilong vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Zilong has +2.9% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Zilong when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Zilong?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.
